files.src/App.css: :root{color-scheme:dark}*{box-sizing:border-box}html,body,#root{margin:0;min-height:100%;background:#020617}body{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif}.page{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px;background:#020617;color:#e5e7eb}.card{width:min(100%,680px);min-width:0;display:grid;gap:14px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #1f2937;border-radius:16px;background:#0b1020}.header{min-width:0;display:grid;gap:5px}.header h1{margin:0;font-size:21px}.subtitle,.hint,.invite-limit,.invite-status{margin:0;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.subtitle{color:#9ca3af;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5}.combobox{position:relative;min-width:0;display:grid;gap:7px}.field-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#cbd5e1}.chip-field{min-width:0;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #374151;border-radius:12px;background:#0a0f1e}.chip-field:focus-within{border-color:#a3e635;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(163,230,53,.16)}.chip{max-width:100%;min-width:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:5px 9px;border:1px solid #334155;border-radius:999px;background:#172036;font-size:13px}.chip-label{min-width:0;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.chip-remove{flex:0 0 auto;border:0;background:transparent;color:#cbd5e1;cursor:pointer;font-size:17px;line-height:1;padding:0}.chip-remove:hover{color:#fff}.chip-input{flex:1 1 190px;min-width:140px;max-width:100%;border:0;outline:0;background:transparent;color:#f8fafc;font:inherit;font-size:14px;padding:5px 2px}.chip-input::placeholder{color:#64748b}.chip-input:disabled{cursor:not-allowed;color:#94a3b8}.chip-remove:focus-visible,.chip-input:focus-visible,.suggestion:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #facc15;outline-offset:2px}.suggestions{position:absolute;z-index:10;top:100%;left:0;right:0;max-height:260px;overflow:auto;margin:7px 0 0;padding:0;border:1px solid #334155;border-radius:12px;background:#0a0f1e;list-style:none;box-shadow:0 16px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}.suggestion{min-width:0;display:grid;gap:3px;padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(51,65,85,.6);cursor:pointer;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.suggestion:last-child{border-bottom:0}.suggestion:hover,.suggestion.active{background:rgba(163,230,53,.13)}.suggestion strong{font-size:14px}.suggestion span{color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px}.hint,.invite-limit,.invite-status{font-size:12px;line-height:1.5}.hint{color:#94a3b8}.invite-limit{color:#cbd5e1;font-weight:650}.invite-status{min-height:18px;color:#bef264}@media(max-width:480px){.page{place-items:start center;padding:12px}.card{padding:15px}.chip-field{align-items:stretch}.chip-input{flex-basis:100%;min-width:0}.suggestions{max-height:220px}.chip{max-width:100%}}
